overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a high-quality game engine garden courtyard featuring a central stone fountain, lush vegetation, and colorful butterflies fluttering about. The scene is set within stone walls under an overcast sky, creating a peaceful and serene atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled garden courtyard with central water feature

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the garden courtyard and fountain

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water and central statue
tall stone walls enclosing the garden with an arched gateway
stone archway in the center of the far wall
tall slender green tree against the left wall
bushes with white flowers along the right side
ornamental stone lantern on the right foreground
flower bed with purple blooms on the left side

segments.scene_description: A serene walled garden courtyard centered around a circular stone fountain. The space features cobblestone paving, lush vegetation including flowering bushes and trees, and historic stone architecture with an archway in the background. Colorful butterflies flutter around the fountain in this peaceful game engine environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a serene, static view of a walled garden courtyard that maintains a peaceful and timeless atmosphere. It begins by focusing on a circular stone fountain at the center of a cobblestone plaza, where colorful butterflies flutter in the air. The camera captures the surrounding lush vegetation, including flowering bushes and trees that frame the space. The scene then expands to reveal the historic stone architecture and a distant archway, all set under a soft, overcast sky.
